ability.name: Frostbite
ability.description: Fire an ice shard at target that deals 325/455/650 (AP) magic damage. If they are Chilled, the damage Critically Strikes.

ability.name: Static Field
ability.description: Gain 400/480/600 (AP) Shield for 4 seconds and deal 56/84/126 magic damage to all enemies within 1 hex.

ability.name: Blood Frenzy
ability.description: Leap to the furthest enemy within 2 hexes. For 4 seconds gain increased Move Speed, 25% Attack Damage, and 300%/300%/350% (AP) decaying Attack Speed.

ability.name: Ace in the Hole
ability.description: Fire a bullet towards the farthest enemy, dealing 515/775/1205 (ADAP) physical damage to the first enemy it hits. If they die, the bullet ricochets, dealing excess damage to the next enemy hit..

ability.name: Tentacle Smash
ability.description: Restore 249/328/439 (HealthAP) Health and slam a tentacle, dealing 180/270/405 (AD) physical damage to enemies in a line.

ability.name: Demacian Standard
ability.description: Gain 350/425/500 (AP) Shield for 4 seconds. Grant all allies 20%/25%/50% (AP) Attack Speed for 4 seconds.

ability.name: Curtain Call
ability.description: For the next 4 attacks, set Attack Speed to 1, gain infinite range and replace attacks with a cannon shot. Cannon shots deal 160/237/359 (AD/AP) physical damage. The 4th shot deals 144% more damage.

ability.name: Caustic Spittle
ability.description: Deal 140/200/300 (AP) magic damage to target and reduce their Armor and Magic Resist by 8/10/15. Adjacent enemies are dealt 50% of the damage and effect.

ability.name: Whimsy
ability.description: Deal 330/500/750 (AP) magic damage to target and make them dance for 2 seconds. The projectile then bounces to the nearest target, dealing 140/210/315 (AP) magic damage.

ability.name: Clear The Brush
ability.description: Dash to a nearby hex and swing forward, dealing 180/270/445 (ADAP) physical damage to enemies in a 2-hex line.

ability.name: Junkyard Titan
ability.description: Gain 350/430/550 (AP) Shield for 4 seconds. Fire a burst of flames, dealing 72%/108%/162% (Armor) magic damage in a cone.

ability.name: Stand United
ability.description: Grant 250/325/425 (AP) Shield to this unit and a nearby damaged ally for 4 seconds.

ability.name: Power Chord
ability.description: Deal 130/195/300 (AP) magic damage to 2 nearby enemies and restore 30/40/65 (AP) Health to the lowest Health ally.

ability.name: Blade of the Ruined King
ability.description: Active: Deal 55/85/125 (AD) physical damage to target. For the rest of combat, Viego's attacks deal 18/27/42 (AP) bonus stacking magic damage.

ability.name: Incendiary Onslaught
ability.description: Start with Infernum equipped. On cast, switch to Severum for 8 (AP) attacks. Infernum: Attacks hit 3 enemies and apply 30% Sunder for 6 seconds. Severum: Gain 200% Attack Speed and 10% Omnivamp. Attacks are replaced with swipes that deal 80/120/200 (AD) physical damage.

ability.name: True Ice Arrow
ability.description: Fire an arrow at target that deals 155/225/340 (ADAP) physical damage to them and 51/74/112 (ADAP) damage to adjacent enemies. Targets below 30% max Health take true damage instead. 30% Chill all enemies hit for 3 seconds. Bloodsworn Bond: Attacks fire a bonus arrow for every 10% Attack Damage granted to Tryndamere by Bloodsworn Bond. These arrows deal 2%/4%/5% (AD) physical damage. (Current Bonus Arrows: X).Chill: Reduce Attack Speed.

ability.name: Traveler's Call
ability.description: Launch 6 Meeps at nearby enemies that deal 130/185/255 (AP) magic damage. Add an additional Meep for each 3-star unit on your board.

ability.name: Rupture
ability.description: Restore 200/225/400 (AP) Health and rupture a 2 hex circle beneath target. After a brief delay, enemies within are knocked up for 1.5 seconds and take 88/152/248 (HealthAP) magic damage.

ability.name: Parallel Convergence
ability.description: Create a 1 hex zone around the target that lasts 3 seconds. The next 3 attacks deal 160/240/380 (AP) bonus magic damage. When the zone ends, it deals 130/195/295 (AP) magic damage + 10% of the target's damage taken during the

ability.name: Collateral Damage
ability.description: Passive: Attacks fire in a cone on target, dealing 45% damage to other enemies hit. Active: Fire an explosive shell at target, dealing 200/300/495 (AD) physical damage split among enemies in a 1 hex circle. Partners in Crime: When you field Graves and Twisted Fate, both gain bonuses.

ability.name: Pop Blossom
ability.description: Leap at target and gain 400/475/600 (AP) Shield for 4 seconds. Slam down after a brief delay, dealing 80/120/180 (AP) magic damage to enemies within two hexes and 20% Chilling them for 2 seconds. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed

ability.name: Command: Protect
ability.description: Send the Ball to target, dealing 200/300/550 (AP) magic damage and splitting 120/180/300 (AP) magic damage among enemies within a 1 hex circle. Then grant 60/90/130 (AP) Shield to the two lowest Health allies for 3 seconds.

ability.name: Hammer Shock
ability.description: Gain 330/410/500 (AP) Shield for 4 seconds and deal 70/105/165 (AD) physical damage to target. After a delay, briefly knock them up and deal the damage again. Bucklers fly out from the target, granting 2 nearby allies 30% of the Shield gained.

ability.name: Burrow
ability.description: Dash to the furthest enemy within 3 hexes and deal 160/240/360 (ADAP) physical damage to them. The next 3 attacks hit adjacent enemies and deal 110/165/300 (AD) physical damage.

ability.name: Soul Furnace
ability.description: Passive: Takedowns grant 18/20/50 permanent max Health. (Total: X) Active: Gain 226/247/284 (HealthAP) Shield for 4 seconds. When it breaks, deal 26/47/84 (Health) magic damage to adjacent enemies.

ability.name: Toxic Dart
ability.description: Shoot the closest unpoisoned enemy, dealing 130/200/375 (AP) magic damage and poisoning them for 8 seconds. Poisoned enemies take 35/55/100 (AP) magic damage each second..

ability.name: Buster Shot
ability.description: Fire a massive cannonball at target, dealing 295/445/730 (ADAP) physical damage. If they are within 2 hexes, knock them back 2 hexes and briefly Stun them..

ability.name: Undying Rage
ability.description: Become enraged for 5 seconds. While enraged, gain 15% (AP) Durability and attacks are replaced with a strike that deals 110/160/235 (AD) physical damage. Ignore 30% of Armor against Chilled enemies. Bloodsworn Bond: Gain increased Move Speed. Gain 10% Attack Damage, permanently increased by 1% whenever Ashe or Tryndamere score a kill. (Current Bonus: X) Chill: Reduce Attack Speed

ability.name: Stacked Deck
ability.description: Passive: Attacks deal 50/75/115 (AP) bonus magic damage. After every 3rd attack, throw 3 cards in a cone that deal 70/105/160 (AP) magic damage, reduced by 50% for each enemy they pass through. Partners in Crime: When you field Graves and Twisted Fate, both gain bonuses

ability.name: Relentless Force
ability.description: Gain 125/150/175 (AP) Shield for 2 seconds. Slam on target, dealing 120/180/270 (AD) physical damage to enemies in a 1 hex range. Every third cast deals 150/225/340 (AD) damage in a 2 hex range instead and knocks up enemies hit for 1 second.

ability.name: Three Talon Strike
ability.description: Strike target 3 times. Each strike deals 65/100/150 (AD) physical damage and restores 105/145/200 (AP) Health. The final one Stuns for 1.5 seconds.

ability.name: Sweeping Blade
ability.description: Dash, then deal 103/157/233 (ADAP) physical damage to adjacent enemies. If only one enemy is hit, deal double damage. Blade Brothers: When Yone casts, your strongest Yasuo blinks to every target Yone hits and deals 100% AD physical damage to each.

ability.name: Mourning Mist
ability.description: Restore 250/350/500 (APSouls) Health. Throw a globule of black mist at the enemy who has dealt the most damage this combat, preferring unique enemies. It 20% Chills them for 4 seconds and raises the Mana cost of their next cast by 20. It then deals 123/187/288 (Health) magic damage in 1 hex radius. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed

ability.name: Fox-Fire
ability.description: Fire 3 flames at target, each dealing 82/125/225 (AP) magic damage. Every 3rd cast, fire 9 flames split between the target and up to 2 nearby enemies. If there are nearby enemies, dash away.

ability.name: Decimate
ability.description: Restore 345/523/857 (HealthAP) Health and spin, dealing 90/135/210 (AD) physical damage to adjacent enemies and applying a stack of Hemorrhage that deals 12/18/30 (AD) physical damage each second for 5 seconds. If an enemy with Hemorrhage drops below 8% Health, slam on them, instantly killing them. (Each stack increases the execute threshold by 5%)

ability.name: Maximum Dosage
ability.description: Bulk up for 5 seconds. While bulked, restore 114/192/325 (HealthAP) Health every second and attacks deal 105/171/291 (HealthAD) physical damage.

ability.name: Spinning Axes
ability.description: Passive: If Draven has an empowered axe in hand, his next attack will throw it. On takedown, gain an Adoration stack, doubled if Draven or Darius scored the kill. Every 11 Adoration stacks grants 1/3/5 Gold. (Adoration Left: 11, Gold Generated: Xg) Active: Spin an empowered axe that replaces his basic attack and deals 130/195/375 (ADAP) physical damage and returns to Draven after hitting an enemy.

ability.name: Powder Kegs
ability.description: Toss barrels at the 3 nearest enemies and detonate them. They deal 215/325/525 (ADAP) damage, reduced by 25% for each barrel in the chain. Barrels reduce their target's Armor by 10, increased to 20 if the damage critically strikes.

ability.name: Snip Snip!
ability.description: Dash around target and snip 5 (Souls) times, dealing 50/75/120 (AP) magic damage to them and 25/35/60 (AP) damage to all other enemies in a cone.

ability.name: Switcheroo!
ability.description: Passive: After attacking 18/18/16 times, switch to Fishbones. While equipped, attacks are replaced with 3 rockets that target random enemies and deal 58/88/159 (AD) physical damage.

ability.name: Slicing Maelstrom
ability.description: Gain 600/700/900 (AP) Shield and summon storm of lightning. 6 waves of bolts hit enemies within, dealing 120/180/290 (AP) magic damage over 3 seconds. The first 3 targets to be struck by 3 bolts are Stunned for 1.5 seconds. Multiple Stuns on the same enemy have 50% effectiveness.

ability.name: You & Me!
ability.description: Passive: Yuumi joins your strongest Kobuko. Every 3 seconds, she alternates between healing the lowest Health ally for 140/180/240 (AP) Health or granting 25/33/50% Attack Speed to the ally who has dealt the most damage for 4 seconds. Active: Dance, restoring 314/485/819 (HealthAP) Health over 3 seconds.

ability.name: Distortions
ability.description: Summon 3 dashing mirror images that strike the target and up to 2 other nearby enemies. The target takes 300/450/800 (AP) magic damage and is Stunned for 1 second, while other units hit take 180/270/500 (AP) magic damage.

ability.name: Solar Flare
ability.description: Passive: Reduce instances of incoming damage by 15/30/80 (AP). Your strongest Leona grants your strongest Diana 3/4/5 Ability Power every second she survives. Active: Call down sun beams on the 3/3/4 nearest enemies, Stunning them for 1 second and dealing 80/120/200 (AP) magic damage. Wound and 1% Burn them for 4 seconds. Wound: Reduce healing received by 33% Burn: Deal a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second

ability.name: Piltover Tussle
ability.description: Gain 700/800/1000 (AP) Shield for 4 seconds. Charge and knock the target backwards, Stunning them and units hit for 1.25 seconds and dealing 150/225/360 (AP) magic damage to them. After charging, force nearby enemies to target this unit.

ability.name: Void Swarm
ability.description: Summon 2 Voidlings that each attack a nearby enemy 8 times. Each attack deals 30/45/80 (AP) magic damage.

ability.name: Ultra Mega Fire Kick!!!
ability.description: Launch a fuemigo at target that bounces 3 times, dealing 190/285/445 (AP) magic damage to enemies hit. The last bounce deals 160/240/375 (AP) magic damage to enemies in a 1 hex radius.

ability.name: Titan's Wrath
ability.description: Passive: Every 4 seconds and on cast, the next attack deals damage in a 1 hex circle and deals 45/68/108 (MR) bonus magic damage. Active: Gain 465/562/717 (HealthAP) Shield for 4 seconds.

ability.name: Winter's Wrath
ability.description: Gain 525/575/775 (AP) Shield for 4 seconds. Strike in a cone and a line. Enemies hit take 70/105/170 (AP) magic damage and are 30% Chilled for 4 seconds. If they are already Chilled, Stun them for 1 second. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed

ability.name: Tumble
ability.description: Tumble to a nearby hex, then fire a bolt at target that deals 116/175/300 (ADAP) true damage.

ability.name: Double Trouble Bubble
ability.description: Passive: Damaging an enemy applies 30% Shred for 6 seconds. Active: Kick 2 bubbles at nearby enemies, dealing 330/500/1000 (AP) magic damage and 30% Chilling them for 2 seconds. Shred: Reduce Magic Resist Chill: Reduce Attack Speed

ability.name: Lacerate
ability.description: Swipe and dash around target, dealing 50/75/350 (ADAP) physical damage to enemies in the path. Then slam chains on target, dealing 158/236/1103 (ADAP) physical damage in a line. If any enemies are killed, immediately recast this ability, dealing 80% damage. The slam deals 40/40/100% more damage to Tanks.

ability.name: Endless Banquet
ability.description: Passive: On takedown, gain 75/75/200% Attack Speed that decays over 3 seconds. Active: Deal 150/225/900 (AD) physical damage in a 2 hex radius and transform for the rest of combat. While transformed, gain 33%/33%/133% (AP) Attack Speed, 33% max Health, and increased Move Speed. Attacks deal 15/25/100 bonus true damage, increased by 3/5/30 for each time the same enemy is hit.

ability.name: Unbreakable Frost
ability.description: Raise shield for 4 seconds, gaining 55%/55%/90% (AP) Durability and redirecting projectiles to towards Braum instead. When hit, deal 27/43/1245 (ArmorAP) magic damage to nearby enemies and 30% Chill them for 2 seconds. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed

ability.name: Lunar Rush
ability.description: Passive: Ability damage from your strongest Leona and strongest Diana marks enemies as Moonlit, reducing their damage by 10%. Active: Gain 100/175/300 (AP) Shield. Unleash a bolt of lunar energy at the farthest non-Moonlit enemy within 4 hexes, dealing 125/190/600 (AP) magic damage. Then, dash to all Moonlit enemies, dealing 160/240/1500 (AP) magic damage to them.

ability.name: Playful Trickster
ability.description: Become briefly untargetable, then jump to the farthest enemy within 4 hexes, avoiding Tanks and Fighters, and deal 75/115/450 (AP) magic damage to adjacent enemies. For the next 4 attacks, gain 100% Attack Speed and deal 50/75/600 (AP) bonus magic damage on hit.

ability.name: Judgment
ability.description: Spin for 3 seconds, gaining 50/50/80% Durability and healing for 370/516/1589 (HealthAP) over the duration. Each second, deal 100/150/1700 (AD) physical damage to adjacent enemies and reduce their Armor and Magic Resistance by 5.

ability.name: Icathian Rain
ability.description: Dash away from all enemies, then fire 15/15/25 missiles split across the 4 nearest enemies. Each missile deals 45/72/170 (ADAP) physical damage.

ability.name: Endless Rend
ability.description: Summon 25 (Souls) spears split among the 4 nearest enemies. After a brief delay, they each impale their target, dealing 33/53/465 (ADAP) physical damage and reducing Armor by 1.

ability.name: Frozen Tomb
ability.description: Encase target in ice, Stunning them for 1 second and dealing 315/475/2800 (AP) magic damage. All enemies within 2 hexes of them split 415/625/2800 (AP) magic damage. If the target dies, shards fly out and split excess damage between the 2 nearest enemies. Chilled enemies take 12% more damage from this ability. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed

ability.name: Final Spark
ability.description: Fire a ball of light at the most enemies, dealing 30/45/100 (AP) magic damage to the first 2 enemies hit and Rooting them for 1 second. Then fire a beam, dealing 330/500/1600 (AP) magic damage to enemies hit by the ball and 90/135/900 (AP) magic damage to all other enemies hit.

ability.name: Heartbreaker
ability.description: Passive: Attacks ricochet to the highest current Health enemy, dealing 50/50/100% damage. Active: Fire waves of bullets that land on the 2/2/6 nearest enemies. The first wave deals 245/370/3070 (ADAP) physical damage and the rest deal 98/148/2456 (ADAP) physical damage. Every 3rd cast, increase the number of waves by 1.

ability.name: Fury of the Sands
ability.description: Steal 500/685/3000 (AP) Health split between the 4/4/8 nearest enemies. For 8 seconds, gain 30 Armor and Magic Resist and deal 23/41/583 (Health) magic damage to adjacent enemies each second.

ability.name: Relentless Pounce
ability.description: Jump on an adjacent enemy with the lowest health, then deal 290/470/2000 (AP) magic damage to them and 100/150/600 (AP) magic damage to adjacent enemies. If any die, cast again, dealing 70% damage. Tanks take 60% more damage from this ability and Fighters take 30% more.

ability.name: Slice and Dice
ability.description: Dash to the lowest Health enemy within 2 hexes, dealing 80/120/360 (AD) physical damage to all enemies in the path. Then slash 4 times, each dealing 55/85/600 (ADAP) physical damage. Subsquent casts increase the number of slashes by 1.

ability.name: Warp Armor
ability.description: Gain 300/425/2000 max Health and grow larger. Slam in a 2 Hex circle on the target, dealing 166/269/2428 (APHealth) magic damage to enemies hit. For 4 seconds, gain 25%/25%/80% (AP) Durability + 1% for each enemy targeting this unit.

ability.name: Grand Encore
ability.description: Gain 3 notes. For each one active, deal 40/60/300 (AP) magic damage to a nearby enemy. While holding 12 notes on cast, consume them to project a wave of energy. Allies hit restore 40/80/400 (AP) Health. Enemies hit take 270/405/2200 (AP) magic damage, reduced by 30% for each enemy it's passed through.

ability.name: Poison Trail
ability.description: Passive: Run around the battlefield, leaving a poison trail that lingers for 4 seconds. Poison trails deal 8/18/160 (AP) magic damage per second to enemies within. Gain 3.5 (AS) Mana each second. Active: For 4 seconds, gain increased Move Speed, restore 15/80/500 (AP) Health each second, and gain 20/60/100 Armor and Magic Resistance

ability.name: Impale
ability.description: Passive: All allies gain 10/20/100 Armor. Active: Gain 750/950/3000 (AP) Shield for 4 seconds. Impale up to three nearby enemies in a line, dealing 8400%/12600%/175000% (Armor) physical damage and Stunning them for 1.5/1.75/8 seconds.

ability.name: Nevermove
ability.description: Passive: Each second, restore 36/52/158 (HealthAP) Health and deal 20/30/90 (AP) magic damage to enemies within 1 Hex. Active: Open a demonic eye on the largest group of nearby enemies, dealing 100/150/1800 (AP) magic damage and Stunning them for 1.5/1.75/8 seconds.

ability.name: Starlight's Touch
ability.description: Passive: All allies gain 10/20/100 Magic Resist. Once per combat after dropping below 35% max Health, restore 300/700/2500 health over 2 seconds. Active: Gain 600/700/2500 (AP) Shield and grant the 2 lowest Health allies 125/150/1000 (AP) Shield for 4 seconds. The next 2/2/10 attacks deal 200/300/3000 (AP) bonus magic damage.

ability.name: Dark Storm
ability.description: Passive: Gain 50% more Ability Power from all sources. Active: Call down a storm of 12/12/24 meteors across the battlefield that deal 56/84/199 (AP) magic damage each. They can innately critically strike. For each one that kills an enemy, permanently gain 1 Ability Power. (Permanent Ability Power: X AP)

ability.name: Eternal Hunger
ability.description: Gain 100/100/400% Attack Speed, 15% Omnivamp, increased Move Speed, and deal 55/85/550 (AD) bonus physical damage on attack for the rest of combat. While this effect is active, takedowns grant Warwick, Jinx, and Vi 20%/20%/50% (AP) Attack Speed for 3 seconds.

ability.name: Diverting Trickster
ability.description: Passive: On death, summon a Stone copy with 570/956/3361 (Health) Health and Wukong's items. Active: For 4 seconds, gain 100/110/400 (AP) Armor and Magic Resist. Then spin, dealing 150/225/3000 (AD) physical damage to all enemies within 2 hexes.

ability.name: Kin of the Stained Blade
ability.description: Passive: Attacks alternate between dealing 55/85/800 (AD) bonus physical damage and 110/165/1400 (AP) bonus magic damage. Active: Strike through the most enemies possible within 3 hexes, knocking them up for 1.5 seconds and dealing 80/120/480 (ADAP) physical damage and 80/120/480 (ADAP) magic damage. Yone then splits 280/420/2160 (ADAP) physical damage and 280/420/2160 (ADAP) magic damage among all enemies hit. Blade Brothers: When Yone casts, your strongest Yasuo blinks to each target, dealing bonus physical damage.

ability.name: Transcendent State
ability.description: For the next 4 seconds, gain 90%/90%/300% Attack Speed, infinite range, and replace attacks with lasers. Lasers deal 88/128/433 (ADAP) physical damage in a line, reduced by 75/75/30% for each enemy they pass through. When lasers critically strike, they deal 33% bonus true damage.

ability.name: The Darkin Blade
ability.description: On cast, cycle through one of the following abilities: Slash in a line, dealing 115/210/2500 (ADAP) physical damage to enemies hit and 20% Sundering them for 4 seconds. Swipe in a cone, dealing 138/252/3000 (ADAP) physical damage to enemies hit and knocking them up for 1 second. Slam on target, dealing 184/336/4000 (ADAP) physical damage in a 1 hex circle. Targets below 15% max Health are executed.

ability.name: Enraged Inferno
ability.description: Erupt the entire battlefield in flames, permanently Burning and Wounding all enemies and dealing 1500/2250/8000 (AP) magic damage to each of them over 45 seconds. Annie's max Mana is reduced by 140 for the rest of combat. Subsquent casts launch a fireball at target that deals 240/360/3000 (AP) magic damage. Burn: Deal a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%

ability.name: The Skies Descend
ability.description: Passive: For every 250 ability damage dealt to enemies in player combat, gain Stardust. Stardust makes The Skies Descend more powerful. (Current Stardust: X) Active: Crash a star on target, dealing 525/725/5000 (AP) magic damage in a 2 hex radius. Stardust Upgrades: 25: Create a shockwave that deals 100/150/1000 (AP) additional magic damage in a 3 Hex radius. 60: The star crash deals 15% more damage. 140: Shockwave increases to a 4 hex radius. 200: Knock up targets in the star crash for 1.5 seconds. 300: Shockwave increases to 10 radius. 550: The star crash deals 33% bonus true damage. 800: Also call down a meteor storm that deals 500/750/9999 (AP) magic damage split between living enemies. 1444: Summon a black hole at the epicenter, instantly killing enemies within.

ability.name: Arise!
ability.description: Passive: After witnessing 3 attacks from Azir, Sand Soldiers deal 100/150/3000 (AP) magic damage to their target. Active: Summon a Sand Soldier near target and command them to strike. If 2 Soldiers are already out, they all immediately deal 90/135/5000 (AP) magic damage instead.

ability.name: Wrath of the Void
ability.description: Passive: Immune to Crowd Control effects. Attacks deal damage in a line on target. If no enemies are in range, dash to the next one and knock up adjacent enemies on arrival. While in the Void Rift, erupt a tentacle below a random enemy every 3/3/0.25 seconds that knocks them up for 1.5 seconds. Active: Slam and erect spikes in a 2 hex circle, dealing 280/420/20500 (ADAP) physical damage to enemies hit. Then over 3 seconds, spit 10 globs of acid that deal 112/189/10250 (ADAP) physical damage.

ability.name: Seismic Slam
ability.description: Passive: Immune to crowd control effects. Attacks briefly knock up the target and deal 50% damage in a 1 hex radius around them. Active: Slam the ground, dealing 186/265/1617 (HealthAD) physical damage to ALL enemies, reduced by 15% for each hex from the center (down to 40%.) If this is the first time they've been hit by Seismic Slam this combat, knock them up for up to 1.75 seconds. 12/12/99 rocks fall around the battlefield, each dealing 220/405/700 (ADAP) physical damage to enemies hit.

ability.name: Crowstorm
ability.description: Teleport into a large cluster of enemies within 2 hexes and Stun them for 1.25/1.25/99 seconds. Begin losing 22 mana per second. While casting, deal 100/150/6666 (AP) magic damage per second to all enemies within a 2 hex radius. The closest 2 enemies take 33% more damage.

ability.name: Inspirational Might
ability.description: Passive: Every 3rd attack deals 209/314/4950 (MR) magic damage in a circle around the target. Active: Dash into the largest group of units and inspire all allies within 2 hexes, granting them 500/600/2000 (AP) Shield for 4 seconds. Then crash down, dealing 83/124/550 (MRArmor) bonus magic damage to all enemies with 2 hexes.

ability.name: Lamb's Respite
ability.description: Dash, then create a 2-hex radius zone for 2.5/2.5/99 seconds that shields allies within for 350/750/10000 (AP) health for the zone's duration. While active, double current Attack Speed and on attack, fire a secondary arrow at a nearby enemy that deals 25/38/999 (AD) physical damage. When the zone ends, heal all allies for 8% (AP) of damage dealt while it was up and dash away.

ability.name: The Culling
ability.description: Fire 12/12/42 (AS) shots towards target. Each shot explodes on the first enemy hit, dealing 83/132/900 (ADAP) physical damage to all nearby enemies.

ability.name: Radiant Eclipse
ability.description: Passive: While gaining Mana, throw out 2/2/9 radiant orbs that orbit around target. They deal 65/100/150 (AP) magic damage in a 1 hex radius and drain 1 Mana from enemies hit each second. After draining 235/235/10 mana, gain a random Radiant Item. (X/235/235/10) Active: Detonate orbs on target, causing a 3 hex radius explosion that deals 1000/1500/10000 (AP) magic damage to them and 400/600/10000 (AP) damage to all other enemies hit.

ability.name: Call of the Forge
ability.description: Summon an elemental from behind the farthest enemy. It 20% Chills enemies hit for 5 seconds and deals 100/150/3000 (AP) magic damage to them. When it arrives, headbutt it and redirect it toward another distant enemy, dealing 150/225/4500 (AP) magic damage instead. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed

ability.name: Runic Overload
ability.description: Release a runic blast, dealing 250/430/1500 (AP) magic damage. It splits in two, dealing 33% of the damage to the closest two enemies. Each secondary blast splits an additional time.

ability.name: The Show Stopper
ability.description: Grab target and slam them forward, dealing 200/350/9999 (AP) + 2%/5%/900% (AP) of their max Health as magic damage to them. All other enemies within 3 hexes take 50% of the total damage.

ability.name: Dragon's Descent / Flame Breath
ability.description: Dragon's Descent: Transform into a dragon, gaining 600/1000/9999 max Health. Briefly gain 20/20/90% Durability and dive-bomb into the largest group of enemies, dealing 100/150/3000 (AD) physical damage in a 3 hex circle. Flame Breath: Breath fire in a cone for 3 seconds, dealing 205/305/13579 (ADAP) physical damage each second to enemies hit.

ability.name: Stolen Might
ability.description: Cast one of three spells: Cataclysm: Leap on a nearby enemy. Deal 200/350/1000 (AP) magic damage to all enemies within 2 hexes and Stun them for 1.5/1.75/30 seconds. Demacian Justice: Deal 630/950/99999 (AP) magic damage to target. If they are below 15% max Health, execute them. Final Spark: Gain 400/450/800 (AP) Shield for 1.25 seconds. Deal 300/475/1000 (AP) magic damage to all enemies in a line.

ability.name: Hextech Arsenal
ability.description: Passive: Attacks fire a barrage of 4 bullets. Active: Gain 410/598/67022 (Health) Shield and begin consuming 30 mana per second. Each second while casting, fire a laser that deals 290/435/2150 (ADAP) physical damage, reduced by 70% per enemy hit up to 90%. Additionally, launch 4 (AS) missiles split between 4 nearby enemies that each deal 17/26/129 (ADAP) physical damage.

ability.name: Devour
ability.description: Devour target for 2.5 seconds, dealing 1200/1800/30000 (AP) magic damage and making them immune to other sources of damage. During this time, gain 30% Durability. If they are immune to crowd control, deal 1000/1500/20000 (AP) magic damage instead. If they die while devoured, spit out a random component they were holding or the unit's cost in gold. Otherwise, spit them towards the farthest enemy, briefly Stunning targets on impact.

ability.name: The Box
ability.description: Passive: Each second, deal 30/50/400 (APSouls) magic damage to all enemies within 2 hexes. Heal for 75% of the damage dealt by this effect. Active: Create a prison of walls in a 2 hex radius that lasts 5/5/60 seconds. While active, the Passive's damage is doubled. When an enemy touches a wall, they take 100/150/4000 (AP) magic damage. If there are less than 2 enemies inside The Box at any time, drag an enemy in.

ability.name: The Relentless Storm
ability.description: Bite the target and mark them, dealing 136/215/2117 (ADHealth) physical damage, increased by 60% if they are already marked. After casting 5/5/2 times, leap to a nearby hex, activating Stormbringer and dealing 272/430/4234 (HealthAD) physical damage to enemies within a two hex radius. Stormbringer: Gain 400/550/9999 Health and 50/50/999% Attack Speed. Every 2/2/0.3 seconds, summon a lightning bolt on a nearby enemy, dealing 98/161/1155 (HealthAP) magic damage. Takedowns summon a bolt on fallen enemie

ability.name: Eye of the Ascendant
ability.description: Launch 10/10/99 arcane blasts randomly split between the closest 4/4/10 enemies that each deal 390/650/2500 (AP) magic damage.

ability.name: Divine Challenge
ability.description: Dash around target and slash in a circle, dealing 110/165/1700 (ADAP) physical damage to target and 44/66/680 (ADAP) physical damage to all other adjacent enemies hit. If the target doesn't die, immediately cast again. If this Ability is cast 22 times in a row, instead slam on target, instantly killing them and dealing 220/330/3400 (ADAP) physical damage to all enemies within 3 hexes.

ability.name: Mega Inferno Bomb
ability.description: Passive: Attacks are replaced with a bomb that bounces 1 time, dealing 40/65/500 (ADAP) magic damage to units hit. Active: Throw an enormous bomb at the largest 4-hex group of enemies that explodes on impact, dealing between 70/105/3000 (AP) and 550/875/7000 (AP) magic damage to enemies hit based on their distance from the epicenter.

ability.name: Visions of the End
ability.description: Throw a Time Bomb on the nearest enemy without one. Time Bombs deal 90/135/1000 (AP) magic damage each second. When the target dies, they explode, dealing 150/225/4000 (AP) magic damage in a 1 hex radius and grant Zilean 15 mana. If a Time Bomb is on an enemy for 18/16/1 seconds and Zilean is alive, the enemy instantly dies.
